sn19.12:1.1: … "I saw a man submerged in a pit of dung, eating dung with both hands … ."
sn19.12:1.2: "That being, bhikkhus, was a hostile brahmin in this same Rājagaha. In the time of the Buddha Kassapa's Dispensation, he invited the Bhikkhu Saṅgha to a meal. Having had rice pots filled with dung, he said to the bhikkhus: ‘Sirs, eat as much as you want from this and take the rest away with you.’…"
